summary: The entry function initializes an obfuscated function pointer table using XOR masking, then dispatches execution to a sequence of functions (beacon, noop, persist, sleep) via FUN_140001248. The program also contains exception handling, stack unwinding, and anti-analysis checks.

findings.evidence: Single-byte XOR patterns detected, primarily resulting in repeating characters or junk strings, suggesting padding or false positives.
FUN_1400012c4 XOR-masks function pointers and FUN_140001248 unmasks and calls them.
FUN_1400028d4 uses LoadLibraryExW and GetProcAddress to resolve APIs dynamically.
